# Comprehensive Psychological Services (CPS)

> Utah's trusted behavioral health practice since 1986. Evidence-based neuropsychological evaluations, ADHD testing, autism assessments, custody evaluations, ketamine therapy, and intensive outpatient programs across three locations.

## About

Comprehensive Psychological Services (CPS) is a behavioral health professional services organization established in 1986 in Salt Lake City, Utah. Founded by Steven Szykula, Ph.D., CPS employs 20+ licensed professionals including psychologists, licensed clinical social workers, and clinical mental health counselors. CPS has received the Best Practice Award for clinical excellence and serves individuals, families, employers, courts, and healthcare systems.

## Contact

- Phone: (801) 483-1600
- Fax: (801) 483-1610
- Email: cps@wecanhelpout.com
- Website: https://psychandcustodyevaluations.com
- Legacy site: https://wecanhelpout.com

## Locations

### Salt Lake City (Main Office)
1208 East 3300 South, Salt Lake City, UT 84106
Serving: Salt Lake County

### Layton Market Center
1916 North 700 West, Suite 190, Layton, UT 84041
Serving: Davis County, Weber County

### West Jordan
9069 South 1300 West, Suite D, West Jordan, UT 84088
Serving: South Valley

## Evaluation Services

- [Neuropsychological Evaluations](/neuropsychologist-near-me): Comprehensive brain-behavior assessments for ADHD, TBI, memory, learning disabilities, and cognitive concerns.
- [ADHD Evaluation](/adhd-evaluation-near-me): Thorough multi-method ADHD testing for children, teens, and adults.
- [ADHD Diagnosis](/adhd-diagnosis-near-me): Professional ADHD diagnosis using DSM-5-TR criteria.
- [ADHD Testing](/adhd-testing): Computerized attention tests, rating scales, and cognitive assessment.
- [Neuropsychological Testing for ADHD](/neuropsychological-testing-for-adhd): In-depth neuropsych battery mapping attention, executive function, and processing speed.
- [Autism Assessment](/autism-assessment): Comprehensive autism spectrum evaluations for all ages.
- [ADOS-2 Testing](/ados-2-testing-near-me): Gold-standard autism diagnostic observation schedule.
- [Cognitive Evaluation](/cognitive-evaluation-near-me): IQ testing, memory assessment, and executive function evaluation.
- [Custody Evaluation](/custody-evaluator-near-me): Court-accepted child custody evaluations and parental fitness assessments.

## Treatment Services

- [Ketamine & Spravato Therapy](/ketamine-depression-treatment-near-me): FDA-approved ketamine and esketamine for treatment-resistant depression.
- Intensive Outpatient Programs (IOP): Adult and child/teen programs.
- Counseling & Psychotherapy: Individual, couples, and family therapy.
- Medication Management: Psychiatric medication therapy.
- Neurofeedback / Brain Training: EEG-based brain training with 20+ years experience.
- Substance Abuse Treatment: Court-admissible evaluations and Prime for Life classes.
- Telehealth: Virtual therapy and consultation available.

## Service Areas

Utah, Salt Lake City, Salt Lake County, Davis County (Layton, Bountiful, Farmington, Kaysville, Clearfield), Weber County (Ogden, Roy, Riverdale), West Jordan, South Jordan, Sandy, Draper, Murray, Midvale
